name: service-reset
description: Service interval TEST (read-only / dry-run): reads VIN + odometer (km & miles) from the logbook, shows service history, and SIMULATES the oil/inspection UDS reset -- logs the exact frames but SENDS NOTHING. Ships no sender binary, so it cannot touch the cluster. Safe for anyone. The armed reset stays in tools/ until Autel-confirmed.
author: dspl1236
